description_long: This is a compact, vintage-style moped motorcycle with a dark blue metallic body and a black cushioned seat. The frame is slim and angular, with a prominent headlamp at the front and a small rear luggage rack. The wheels are large with solid, three-spoke rims and the tires are relatively thin, typical of mopeds designed for urban commuting. The handlebars are upright and wide, with visible brake levers and a simple instrument cluster. The engine and exhaust system are exposed beneath the seat, and the overall design is minimalistic, prioritizing functionality and ease of use in city environments.
description: A vintage-style, dark blue moped motorcycle with a slim frame, black seat, and large three-spoke wheels, designed for urban commuting.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the black seat, rear luggage rack, and exposed engine components.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the round headlamp, upright handlebars, and narrow front tire.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the kickstand, chain guard, and the overall slimness of the frame.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the taillight, rear fender, and the back of the seat and luggage rack.
